ddls:
CREATE TABLE "galaxies" (
  "galaxy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each galaxy image */,
  "gxy_name" TEXT /* Name of the galaxy */,
  "image_path" TEXT /* File path to the galaxy image */,
  "image_size" REAL /* Size of the galaxy image in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the image was uploaded */,
  "galaxy_type" TEXT /* Type of the galaxy (e.g., spiral, elliptical) */,
  "redshift" REAL /* Redshift value of the galaxy */,
  "distance" REAL /* Distance to the galaxy in Mpc */,
  "luminosity" REAL /* Luminosity of the galaxy */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the galaxy */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("galaxy_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "image_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each image source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the image source */,
  "source_url" TEXT /* URL of the image source */,
  "source_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the image source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "galaxy_image_sources" (
  "galaxy_id" INTEGER /* ID of the galaxy */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the image source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("galaxy_id", "source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "features" (
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feature */,
  "galaxy_id" INTEGER /* ID of the galaxy the feature belongs to */,
  "alen_rank" REAL /* Rank of the feature in the galaxy */,
  "math_initial_theta" REAL /* Initial theta value of the feature */,
  "pitch_angle" REAL /* Pitch angle of the feature */,
  "math_initial_radius" REAL /* Initial radius of the feature */,
  "relative_theta_start" REAL /* Relative theta start value of the feature */,
  "relative_theta_end" REAL /* Relative theta end value of the feature */,
  "r_start" REAL /* Start radius of the feature */,
  "r_end" REAL /* End radius of the feature */,
  "used2rev" INTEGER /* Whether the feature was used for revolution */,
  "failed2rev" INTEGER /* Whether the feature failed to revolution */,
  "hasUndefinedEndpoints" INTEGER /* Whether the feature has undefined endpoints */,
  "feature_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the feature */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feature_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_features_galaxy_id FOREIGN KEY ("galaxy_id") REFERENCES galaxies ("galaxy_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feature_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feature type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the feature type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the feature type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feature_values" (
  "value_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feature value */,
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* ID of the feature the value belongs to */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the feature type */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the feature */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of the feature value (e.g., degrees, pixels) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("value_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feature_values_feature_id FOREIGN KEY ("feature_id") REFERENCES features ("feature_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feature_values_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES feature_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institutional affiliation of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Departmental affiliation of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "galaxy_id" INTEGER /* ID of the galaxy image being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the galaxy image */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the galaxy image was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_device" TEXT /* Device used for access (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  "access_location" TEXT /* Location of access (e.g., country, institution) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_galaxy_id FOREIGN KEY ("galaxy_id") REFERENCES galaxies ("galaxy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analyses" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis */,
  "galaxy_id" INTEGER /* ID of the galaxy image being analyzed */,
  "analysis_type" TEXT /* Type of analysis performed (e.g., spectral, morphological) */,
  "analysis_date" TEXT /* Date when the analysis was performed */,
  "analysis_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the analysis */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analyses_galaxy_id FOREIGN KEY ("galaxy_id") REFERENCES galaxies ("galaxy_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analysis_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis result */,
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* ID of the analysis the result belongs to */,
  "result_value" REAL /* Value of the analysis result */,
  "result_date" TEXT /* Date when the analysis result was obtained */,
  "result_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the analysis result */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analysis_results_analysis_id FOREIGN KEY ("analysis_id") REFERENCES analyses ("analysis_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "clusterings" (
  "clustering_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each clustering */,
  "galaxy_id" INTEGER /* ID of the galaxy image being clustered */,
  "clustering_type" TEXT /* Type of clustering performed (e.g., k-means, hierarchical) */,
  "clustering_date" TEXT /* Date when the clustering was performed */,
  "clustering_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the clustering */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("clustering_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_clusterings_galaxy_id FOREIGN KEY ("galaxy_id") REFERENCES galaxies ("galaxy_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "clusterings_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each clustering result */,
  "clustering_id" INTEGER /* ID of the clustering the result belongs to */,
  "cluster_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cluster */,
  "result_value" REAL /* Value of the clustering result */,
  "result_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the clustering result */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_clusterings_results_clustering_id FOREIGN KEY ("clustering_id") REFERENCES clusterings ("clustering_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "color_profiles" (
  "profile_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each color profile */,
  "galaxy_id" INTEGER /* ID of the galaxy image the profile belongs to */,
  "color_profile" TEXT /* Color profile of the galaxy image */,
  "profile_date" TEXT /* Date when the color profile was obtained */,
  "profile_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the color profile */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("profile_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_color_profiles_galaxy_id FOREIGN KEY ("galaxy_id") REFERENCES galaxies ("galaxy_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dataset_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset version */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date when the dataset version was created */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the dataset version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_usage" (
  "usage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data usage event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset */,
  "usage_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was used */,
  "usage_type" TEXT /* Type of data usage (e.g., view, download) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("usage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_usage_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES dataset_versions ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_usage_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
